plan.title: swarm: extend runtime capability detection for Grok Build / spawn_subagent (slice 1 of #1342)

narratives.Overview: Extend the existing Runtime Capability Detection logic in the swarm skill (and align with review-cycle) to recognize spawn_subagent-based environments and return a stable platform descriptor.
narratives.ProblemStatement: See GitHub issue #1342 for full context.
narratives.Goals: Implement the assigned slice(s) from the TDD plan in #1342 using the hybrid workaround approach described in the same issue.
narratives.UserStories: As a developer using Grok Build / non-Warp, I want the swarm skill to work natively.

items: Add detection for presence of spawn_subagent tool + absence of start_agent and WARP_* vars
Return consistent platform identifier (e.g. grok-build or spawn_subagent)
Add unit tests for the full detection matrix
